name: motion-morphing-popover
title: Morphing Popover
author: Motion Primitives
description: Expands a trigger into a shared-layout popover.

changes: Changed local utility and click-outside imports from root aliases to ../../lib/utils and ../../hooks/useClickOutside.
Added an instant useReducedMotion MotionConfig path.
Tracked the trigger, moved focus into the open popover, restored it on close, and made the dialog non-modal while retaining Escape and touch outside dismissal.
Memoized open and close callbacks so parent rerenders do not tear down and restart the focus effect.
Adjusted TypeScript annotations for the unified React 19 and Motion 12 catalog host without changing runtime behavior.

modifications.change: Changed local imports and added reduced-motion plus stable non-modal focus management. Adjusted TypeScript annotations for the unified React 19 and Motion 12 catalog host without changing runtime behavior.
modifications.reason: Resolve copied helpers, snap the shared-layout transition when requested, and align focus behavior with a dismissible non-modal popover. Compile several upstream Motion 11-era components safely in the shared catalog while preserving their rendered behavior and install API.
